rationale: The only resume change converts an open-ended career gap into a bounded one (APRIL 2025 — OCTOBER 2025), which legitimately reveals that the most recent AI-agent role lasted roughly six months. The VARIANT's new emphasis on the brevity of that experience keys off this duration signal, which is job-relevant (depth/recency of relevant experience), not off any demographic attribute. The score is unchanged (6/6) and the core concerns (no 8+ years in AI, no RAG/vector DB experience) are identical in substance; the remaining differences are reworded phrasing and ordinary run-to-run variation.
